reason: Streamdown raw HTML sanitizer, semantic class allowlist, theme-adaptive .reply renderer contract.
Request-level htmlVisualPrompt contract between backend prompt shaping and frontend rendering.
Cherry Studio source mapping, palette inspiration, and direct-port risks.

Prompt now forbids semantic HTML containers from using blank lines before 4-space-indented child tags.
